description:
Classify the fz-rh2.9 no-fail mismatch set plus the fz-rh2.16.3 newly-running allocation mismatch: append, bsx_guard_eq, enum_list_allocations, enum_reduce_suspend, enum_sort, filter, process_heap_stats, quicksort, reverse, tree.

Most are allocation-stat or path-specific golden questions; choose explicit expected.fz2-run/interp/build files where the behavior is correct but the allocation contract differs. bsx_guard_eq needs a semantic check because fz2 interp selects a different branch. enum_reduce_suspend now runs through fz2 run/interp/build, but fz2 native allocates additional closure/scalar boxes versus the old native golden, so it needs an explicit fz2 allocation contract before matrix promotion.

Signal: each fixture either has fz2 matrix paths with intentional fz2 goldens, a bug ticket for a semantic mismatch, or a documented out-of-scope reason.
title: Decide fz2 goldens for mismatch-without-failure fixtures
